column1: # Empty vs 0 vs "" across the coercion surfaces — the place blank-cell
# behavior diverges from a literal zero / empty string. The `input` column is
# an OPERATION applied to a typed value; `expected` is its result:
#   op=num:<value>   -> to_number(value), expected n:<f64> or e:<#TOKEN!>
#   op=bool:<value>  -> to_bool(value),   expected b:TRUE|b:FALSE or e:<#TOKEN!>
#   op=blank:<value> -> is_blank? expected b:TRUE|b:FALSE (Empty vs Text(""))
# (value is a typed CellValue literal — see to_number.golden.tsv header.)
